rulings.Case Title: BRUCE PETERSON et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-522590 WITH CASE CGC-12-518927
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 1. Defendant's Motion to Consolidate cases 522590 and 518927 Granted. Cases are consolidated for trial and discovery purposes under case number CGC-12-518927. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CARMEN VALDEZ-MADRANOS' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege sufficient facts in support of each affirmative defense. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: O.K. INVESTMENTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPALITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 9. Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint SUSTAINED. Plaintiff failed to exhaust administrative remedies. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JENNY HE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to May 16, 2013 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CHUN YUEN LIN VS. JIAN CAI MAO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JENNY HE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to May 16, 2013 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ROCKRIDGE TRUST et al VS. WELLS FARGO NA, A SOUTH DAKOTA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause On Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 4. Order To Show Cause On Preliminary Injunction OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Removal filed April 3, 2013. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. BONNIE CURRY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT BONNIE CURRY MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Judgment was entered on September 4, 2012. Defendant brings this motion 5 months later, with declaration supporting potential excusable neglect only as to the 45 days. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN CAI MAO et al VS. CHUN YUAN LIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn To Compel Compliance With Demand For Inspection Of Premises And Req. For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF JIAN MAO, JING MAO Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn To Compel Compliance With Demand For Inspection Of Premises And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Hearing Required to address compliance. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK YI VS. ROMERO, BENJAMIN, A/K/A BENJAMIN ROMERO PALMA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 10. PLAINTIFF FRANK YI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of fact re: residential use of premises; Plaintiff's knowledge of residential use; compliance with SFRO. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH HARNEY VS. JOSEPH MANDELLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JOSEPH MANDELLA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161(4). Defendant failed to show that Plaintiff's allegations do not amount to nuisance as a matter of law. Issues of fact are not properly raised on demurrer. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH HARNEY VS. JOSEPH MANDELLA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT JOSEPH MANDELLA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. MARK THOMAS EDWARDS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss/ Writ Of Prohibition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 24, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT MARK EDWARDS' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss/ Writ Of Prohibition OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Additionally, Appellate Division has DENIED Writ of Mandate/Prohibition based on the same grounds on April 19, 2013. = (501/EHG)
